@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "grpc-21514-support-for-ruby-2-7",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "grpc: Support for Ruby 2.7",
+    "description": "Support for Ruby 2.7. Requested by 52+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current grpc setup",
+        "description": "Verify your grpc version:\ngRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)\nThis feature requires grpc as a dependency."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review grpc configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant grpc configuration:\n### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support for Ruby 2.7",
+        "description": "Very hacky workaround I found:\n\nAt the top of your Gemfile:\n```ruby\nmodule BundlerHack\n  def __materialize__\n    if name == 'grpc' || name == 'google-protobuf'\n      Bundler.settings.temporary(force_ruby_platform: true) do\n        super\n      end\n    else\n      super\n    end\n \n```yaml\n$ RBENV_VERSION=2.7.0-preview3 gem install grpc\nFetching grpc-1.25.0-universal-darwin.gem\nFetching google-protobuf-3.11.2-universal-darwin.gem\nFetching googleapis-common-protos-types-1.0.4.gem\nSuccessfully installed google-protobuf-3.11.2-universal-darwin\nSuccessfully installed googleapis-common-protos-types-1.0.4\nERROR:  Error installing grpc:\n\tThe last version of grpc (>= 0) to support your Ruby & RubyGems was 1.25.0. Try installing it with `gem install grpc -v 1.25.0`\n\tgrpc requires Ruby version >= 2.3, < 2.7.dev. The current ruby version is 2.7.0.preview3.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade grpc to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade grpc:\nUpdate the grpc dependency in your project manifest to the latest version.\nSee the project's releases: https://github.com/grpc/grpc/releases"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support for Ruby 2.7\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Very hacky workaround I found:\n\nAt the top of your Gemfile:\n```ruby\nmodule BundlerHack\n  def __materialize__\n    if name == 'grpc' || name == 'google-protobuf'\n      Bundler.settings.temporary(force_ruby_platform: true) do\n        super\n      end\n    else\n      super\n    end\n  end\nend\nBundler::LazySpecification.prepend(BundlerHack)\n```\n\nThis will force bundler to disregard the precompiled",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ RBENV_VERSION=2.7.0-preview3 gem install grpc\nFetching grpc-1.25.0-universal-darwin.gem\nFetching google-protobuf-3.11.2-universal-darwin.gem\nFetching googleapis-common-protos-types-1.0.4.gem\nSuccessfully installed google-protobuf-3.11.2-universal-darwin\nSuccessfully installed googleapis-common-protos-types-1.0.4\nERROR:  Error installing grpc:\n\tThe last version of grpc (>= 0) to support your Ruby & RubyGems was 1.25.0. Try installing it with `gem install grpc -v 1.25.0`\n\tgrpc requires Ruby version >= 2.3, < 2.7.dev. The current ruby version is 2.7.0.preview3."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "grpc",
+      "incubating",
+      "networking",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "grpc"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/grpc/grpc/issues/21514",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/grpc/grpc"
+    },
+    "reactions": 52,
+    "comments": 20,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "protoc"
+    ],
+    "description": "gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)"
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:41:23.775Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
